name: M-119
events: 16 Feb 1943 M-119 fires two torpedoes against the German merchant Sturzsee (708 GRT) off Kiberg, Norway. Both torpedoes missed their target.
21 Feb 1943 M-119 fires two torpedoes against the German Bali (1428 GRT) off Kiberg, Norway. Both torpedoes missed their target.
4 Mar 1943 M-119 fires two torpedoes against ' what is identified as ' a merchant of 6000 tons off the Varangerfjord. Both torpedoes missed their target.
21 Mar 1943 M-119 fires two torpedoes against ' what is identified as ' a merchant of 7000 tons off the Varangerfjord. Both torpedoes missed their target.
1 May 1943 M-119 fires two torpedoes against ' what is identified as ' a merchant of 10000 tons off the Bosfjord. Both torpedoes missed their target.
19 Nov 1943 M-119 torpedoed and sank the German patrol vessel Nerissa (992 GRT) off the Syltefjord.
3 Mar 1944 M-119 fires two torpedoes against ' what is identified as ' a merchant of 5000 tons in a German convoy off Vard?, Norway in position 70°43'N, 30°16'E. Both torpedoes missed their target.
31 Mar 1944 M-119 fires two torpedoes against ' what is identified as ' an auxiliary patrol vessel off the Syltefjord. Both torpedoes missed their target
